title: (Pack of 8) Red Glitter Candles Love Heart Shaped Tea Lights Valentines Day Gift
features: Pack of 8 glitter candle tea lights
Each candle is decorated with a glittered love heart
Excellent gift for Valentines Day and romantic occasions
Supplied in a clear acetate box
description: Product description These glitter candle tea lights are supplied in packs of 8, each candle measures approx 4cm x 1cm. Each candle is decorated with a glittered love heart and will make an excellent gift or accessory for Valentines Day and romantic occasions. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave unattended. Extinguish before leaving the room or going to sleep. Dispose of candle remnants responsibly.
